subject: Add healthcheck for legacy PAP
commit_message:
Add healthcheck for legacy PAP

Issue-ID: POLICY-2473
Signed-off-by: jhh <jorge.hernandez-herrero@att.com>
Change-Id: Ib6c129b2cc9e9c81335da66df6d6d178de0cbc61

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Azure 1: Chained-CI build started, max time: 14400 seconds

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/4400/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/4400
